name: Royal Booty Quest
short_description: Dive into the world of Royal Booty Quest and experience the thrill of deckbuilding and roguelike adventure like never before.
detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


About the Game

Welcome to Royal Booty Quest, the ultimate fusion of card games and roguelikes, offering a thrilling single-player deckbuilding experience like no other.

In this game, you'll embark on a grand adventure without the need for an internet connection or energy constraints to limit your playtime. Craft your own unique deck, confront a menagerie of bizarre creatures, uncover relics of immense power, vanquish monstrous foes, and craft new cards and potions to strengthen your arsenal. Every choice you make in this epic journey will prove crucial to your success.

While the cooperative mode is currently in development, the game offers a plethora of exciting features, including:

- 6 distinct heroes, each equipped with their own deck of over 70 cards.
- A stunning array of over 100 pixel-art heroes, enemies, and epic bosses, each with their own unique charm.
- The ability to mod and create custom decks, allowing for endless customization and strategic depth.

And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Dive into the world of Royal Booty Quest and experience the thrill of deckbuilding and roguelike adventure like never before.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Polish
